name: confirmIdea(AFFIRM) starts orchestration loop and saves loop_id in runtime state (PHASE-20 Step 2)
description: RED (before PHASE-20 Step 2): confirmIdea returns ok:true but loop_id absent from state, graph.json does not exist. GREEN: after AFFIRM, loop_id present in project_state.json; graph.json exists at orchestration path; graph.current_state === 'ARCHITECT_DESIGN' (vision_locked_intake shortcut).
